reviews.comment:
Me gusta y es confiable. Ahora bien, con el predio que el ACA posee es dale pensar, a muy corto plazo, que ampien las instalaciones. El Playón de surtidores es el mismo de hace varios años. Y LA CUOTA SOCIAL NO ES UN REGALO. A NO QUEDARSE MUCHACHOS.

(Translated by Google)
I like it and it's reliable. However, given the land the ACA owns, it's reasonable to think they'll expand the facilities very soon. The pump area is the same as it was several years ago. AND THE MEMBERSHIP FEE ISN'T A BIT OF A GIFT. DON'T GET LAZY, GUYS.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdnBiVnF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
